title: Mamit-ah Single-use plastic(SUP) hman khap chungchanga hmalak dan tur sawi ho a ni
content:
1111/2026-2027

Dated: Mamit the 22nd of June,2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Mamit-ah khualzinte kal tamnaa (tourist sites) single-use plastic(SUP) hman khap tur chungchangah Pu Suvigya S Chandra, District Bawrhsap hoin hmalak dan tur relin an thukhawm.

District Bawrhsap chuan Supreme Court ina thuchhuah a siam angin single use plastic(sup) hman khapna chu Mamit district ah pawh kenkawh ngei a tul a ni a ti a, hemi ti hlawhtling tur hian Sawrkar mai ni lo khawtlang hruaitute nen nasa taka tan lak a ngai a ni a ti.

Single-use plastic (sarang vawikhat hmana paih leh mai chi) hman khapna chu a bul tan nan Reieka khualzin kal tamna hmun leh LAD park, Mamit a kenkawh tum a ni a, hemi atan hian mipuite hriattir leh awareness campaign neih tum niin hmalak dan tur sawi ho a ni. District Bawrhsap chuan thla tin SUP inspection neih a nih tur thu sawiin inspection team din a ni a, he team hian report thehlutin thupek zawm lo te chungah hmalak a nih tur thu a sawi.

Pi Betty Lalrinfeli, Reiek BDO chuan Reiek block a SUP hman chungchanga hmalakna leh hmalak tulnaah report a pe a, Pu Lalthuama, DUDO Mamit chuan tawih thei lo leh tawih thei bawlhhlawh paih dan tur chungchang te sawiin VC te chu mipuite hnena awareness tha zawk nei turin a ngen.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian hmalak dan tur-action plan siama chumi hmang chuan kal zel dan tur sawi chhunzawm a tul tia rel a ni.

Attachment

title: KHAWZAWLAH DISTRICT LEVEL NASHA MUKHT BHARAT ABHIYAN COMMITTEE THUKHAWM
content:
1110/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 22th June, 2026 :Vawiin khan Khawzawl District Level Nasha Mukht Bharat Abhiyan Committee chu DC Pu K. Vanlalthiana kaihhruaiin Nasha Mukht Bharat Abhiyan (NMBA) Week leh International Day Against Drug Abuse & Illicit Trafficking 2026 hman dan tur relin DC Conference Hall-ah an thukhawm.Khawzawl chhunga school hrang hrangah NMBA Poster/banner tar tura ruahman niin, Chhanchhuahna Home, Grace Camping Centre leh Kimkim Memorial Rehabilitation Centre-te tlawha tanpuina pek tura rel a ni bawk a. June 24, 2026 hian Mualvawm playground atangin DC Office thleng Rally zirlai naupangte nen neih tur a ni a, ruihhlo do chungchang Awareness campaign Govt Sialhawk High Schhol-ah neih tura tih a ni bawk a, High School leh Higher Secondary School zirlaite zingah Painting hmanga intihsiakna buatsaih a ni dawn bawk.June 25, 2026 hian International Day Against Drug Abuse & Illicit Trafficking hun DC Conference Hall-ah hman tura rel a ni a. He hunah hian ruihhlo do chungchang Hlado Chhama inelna buatsaih a ni dawn a, Khawzawl SP hnen atangin Report on Narcotics and Drugs ngaihthlak a ni bawk ang.

Attachment

title: DC, MAMIT ORDER
content:
192/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 22th of June, 2026: In the interest of environmental protection and in pursuance of the Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026, and in compliance with the directions contained in para 10 of Supreme Court Order on Civil Appeal No. 6174/2023 dated 05.05.2026, the use, sale, distribution, storage, and littering of Single-Use Plastics (SUPs) are hereby prohibited within all identified tourist sites and other locations with high visitor footfall in Mamit District, with immediate effect.

All tourists, vendors, shopkeepers, stall operators, event organizers, and visitors are encouraged to adopt environmentally friendly alternatives such as cloth bags, paper bags, bamboo products, areca leaf products, metal utensils, and other biodegradable materials.

All Village Councils, line departments, shopkeepers, vendors, tourists, and members of the public are directed to strictly comply with this Notification. The concerned authorities shall undertake necessary awareness, monitoring, and enforcement measures to ensure effective implementation of the ban.

Any person found violating this Notification shall be liable for action under the provisions of the Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026 and other applicable laws, rules, and regulations

This Notification shall come into force with immediate effect and shall remain in force until further orders.

DC order english (1).pdf

Attachment

title: Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan a bial chhungah school naupang pheikhawk sem chhunzawm
content:
1109/2026-2027

Aizawl the 22nd June, 2026:Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar, Aizawl West II bialtu MLA ni bawk chuan vawiin khan a bial chhung Mizoram Institute of Comprehensive Education (MICE), Tuikual North-ah Primary School Section tan naupang uniform pheikhawk 139 a sem chhunzawm.

Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan sawrkar sikulah zirna a tha a; a bikin pawl sang lamah sawkar school-a luh kan intihhmuh a, kan inchuh nasat hle laiin a pawl hniam lamah erawh luh loh kan intihhmuh thung, a ti a. Sawrkar school te hi a belh tlak a, a rintlak a, a tha tawk tih mipuiin an hriat a duh tih a sawi a ni. Bialtu MLA chuan a bial chhunga sawrkar school te tihchangtlunna atan pheikhawk semin bul a tan a, thildang pawh tih zel a tum tih vawiin programme ah hian a sawi bawk.

MICE zirtirtute hnathawh a taka a hmu chu Minister chuan lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, thahnemngai leh taima taka, hmasawn lehzual tuma thawk turin a fuih a ni.

Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar hian June ni 17, 2026 (Nilaini) atang khan Primary School zirlaite bun tur uniform pheikhawk hi a sem tan a, tun tum hi a thawh thumna leh a hnuhnung ber a ni. Hetihian, Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan a bial chhung school pariatah pheikhawk bun 683 a sem chhuak ta a ni.

Bialtu MLA pheikhawk sem programme ah hian zirtirtu leh zirlaite bakah Tuikual North Local Council te leh zirlai nu leh pate an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Legal Metrology in MRP aia sanga hralh tui bottle man
content:
1108/2026-2027

Aizawl the 22nd June, 2026:June 18 leh 19, 2026 khan Legal Metrology Enforcement chuan Aizawla dawr 13 an endik a. Mineral water bottle "SURE" tih hmingpu chu an hralh to avangin bur 672 an man. Water bottle ₹ 8/- man chu ₹ 10/-, ₹ 15/- man chu ₹ 20/- in sumdawngte hian an zuar a, Rule 18 (2) of the Legal Metrology (Packaged Commodities)Rules, 2011 a kalh avangin thubuai siamsak niin dan anga hrem zui tur an ni ang.

Heng mineral bottle te hi Reliance Consumer Products Limited, Mumbai, Maharastra siam lakluh an ni hlawm.

Legal Metrology chuan thuchhuah siamin India ram chhungah thil fun  (Packaged item) chi reng reng a hralh theihna sang ber (Maximum Retail Price) aia sanga hralh hi phal a ni lova, dan bawhchhia an awm a nih chuan Office of the Controller of Legal Metrology, MINECO, Khatla ah emaw District office hrang hrangah report theih reng an ni.

Attachment

title: BIS, Guwahati leh FCS&CA Department ten PWD Officer-te tan Capacity Building Programme an buatsaih
content:
1107/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 22 June 2026 :Chief Secretary kaihhruai ‘State Level Standardisation Committee’ Thutkhawm hnuhnung berin a lo rel tawh bawhzuiin, vawin khan Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) Guwahati leh FCS&CA Department tangkawp chuan, Mizorama PWD Officer-te tan ni hnih awh ‘Capacity Building on Standardization & Quality Control Program’ chu PWD E-in-C Office Conference Hall, Tuikhuahtlangah an buatsaih.

He hunah hian Pu jacob Biakliana, Inspector, FCS&CA Department chuan thusawiin, Mizoram State tana Committee for Standardisation, Quality Control and Quality Systems pawimawhna, Committee nihphung leh a tum berte a sawifiah a. Committee-in a rel angin Mizoram Sawrkar hnuaia Department hrang hrangte nena Capacity Building Programme neih chu Sawrkarin a ngaipawimawh hle tih tarlangin, Capacity Building Programme an hman chuan Sawrkar Department hrang hrangteah rah duhawm tak chhuahin hmasawnnna hlawkthlak tak thlen ngei se a tih thu a sawi a. Programme chu hlawkpui ngei tum theuh turin kalkhawmte chu duhsakna a hlan nghal bawk.

Vawiin programme-ah hian BIS Guwahati atanga mithiam thlanchhuah bik pahnih – Dr. Anuj Verma, Assistant Professor, RIMT leh Dr. Aaditya Pratap, Assistant Professor, IIT, Benaras Hindu University atanga lo kalte chuan thupui thlanchhuah bik hrang hrang 14-te hmangin kalkhawmte hi zirhona PPT presentation nen an neihpui a. Mizoram PWD hnuaia Senior Executive Engineer chin zawng zawngte Mizoram hmun hrang hrang atangin mi 60 lai Programme-ah hian an tel thei a ni.

PWD officer-te nena hun an hman zawhah hian Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) Guwahati leh FCS&CA Department-te hian Mizoram Sorkar hnuaia PHED officer-te nen Capacity Building Programme hi ni 2 chhung dang hmangho leh turin ruahmanna an siam a ni.

Attachment

title: VB-G RAM G orientation programme Siaha-ah neih a ni
content:
1106/2026-2027

Siaha the 22nd June 2026:July Ni 1, 2026 atanga MGNREGA thlaktu tura Sawrkar in a duan VB-G RAM G orientation programme chu vawiin khan DRRC, DRDO, Siaha-ah neih a ni a, Pu VL Hruaizela Khiangte, District Bawrhsap leh Pu M Misael, Project Director, DRDO ten thusawina an nei.

District Bawrhsap Pu VL Hruaizela Khiangte chuan India in kum 2047 a Hmasawn Ram (Developed Country) nih a tumna kal zela hmalakna pakhat VB-G RAM G chungchang District Level official-te tana inhrilhhriatna programme a tel te chu lawmthu a hrilh a, kum 20 chuang hret MGNREGS chu kalpui a nih tawh hnuah tawha her rem ngaite her rem a, mipuite tana tangkai lehzual tura siam VB-G RAM G duan a ni chu a lawmawm hle a ti. ‘Mizoram chhim tawpa chengte pawh he Vikshit Bharat 2047 suangtuahna ah kan tel vek a, state dang leh ram dangte ruala hmasawnna hmel kan hmuh ve theihna turin department hrang hrangte thawhhona (convergence) tha neih a pawimawh’ a ti a, thahnemngai taka thawkho tura chahin scheme thar chu tha taka hman a nih theih nan duhsakna a hlan nghal a ni.

Pu M Misael, PD DRPO pawhin kalkhawmte chungah lawmthu a sawi a, MGNREGs ah DC chu District Programme Coordinator  a ni a, VB-G RAM G ah pawh a chairmanna hnuaiah District Level Screening Committee din tur a nih thu tarlangin a tawiawmna a ngen nghal a ni. VB-G RAM G hman tan a nih dan leh Dan a siam a nih tak dante tarlangin Vawiin orientation programme chu interactive taka hman nise a duh thu a sawi a, hriat chian loh te zawt hrehlo turin leh hlawhtling taka kalpui a nih theih nan kalkhawmte thawhopuiah a sawm bawk a ni.

Pu AZ Beisia, ARDO, DRDO Siaha chuan he hun hi a kaihruai a, Pu C Lalremruata, WM, DRDO Siaha hnen atangin VBGRAMG chungchanga hriattur tul leh pawimawhte PowerPoint presentation hmanga ngaihthlak ho a ni.

Attachment

title: MAMIT DISTRICT BAWRHSAP THUCHHUAH
content:
1105/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 22th of June, 2026 :Environment humhalhna atan leh Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026 leh Civil Appeal No. 6174/2023 dated 05.05.2026-a Supreme Court Order para 10-na in a sawi ang in, Single-Use Plastics (SUPs) hmanga siam bungrua reng reng Mamit District chhunga tourist site hrang hrang leh Vantlang hmun lun laiah te hman, hralh, semdarh, dahkhawm leh paih khap tlat a ni a. He thupek hi chhuah anih ni atangin hman nghal tur a ni.

Khualzin, sumdawng, dawr neitu, event organiser leh Mamit District chhunga cheng zawng zawngte chu Single Use Plastic aiah environment tana tha zawk, entirnan. Puan, lehkha, mau leh kuhva hnah hmanga siam ip/bungrua leh thir hmanga siam, silfaia hman nawn leh theih leh TAWIHTHEI thil atanga siam dangte, hmang uar zawk tura hriattir an ni e.

Mamit District chhunga Village Council zawng zawng. Sawrkar pisa, dawr neitu, khualzinte leh mipui zawng zawng te chu he thupek hi zawm tlat tura hriattir an ni a. He thupek kaihhnawiha thuneitute chu mipui hnenah a zau thei ang bera lo puangzara endikna lo kalpui tur leh thupek zawmna kawnga hmalakna hrang hrangte kalpui tur a hriattir an ni bawk e.

He thupek zawmlo apiang chu Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026 leh a kaihhnawih dan dang hmanga hremna pek theih an ni ang.

DC thupek.pdf

Attachment

title: 1ST IR BATTALION HNUAIA STATE DISASTER RESPONSE FORCE (SDRF) TEN REFRESHER COURSE AN NEI
content:
1104/2026-2027

Mualvum, 22nd June, 2026:Chhiatrupna (disaster) chi hrang hrang thleng thei laka chhanchhuah hna tha leh chak zawka kalpui a nih theih nan, vawiin khan 1st IR Battalion, Mualvum hnuaia State Disaster Response Force (SDRF) te chuan intuaitharna (Refresher Course) an nei.

He SDRF Refresher Course hi 1st IR Bn Commandant, Pu M.S. Dawngkima chuan a hmanpui a. Commandant chuan thu sawiin, chhiatrupna chu engtik hunah pawh thleng thei reng a nih avangin SDRF mi leh sate chuan an thiamna leh theihnate belhchhahin an intuaihriam reng a ngai a, chumi atana he hun pawh hi buatsaih a nih thu a sawi. Mipuiten puih an ngaih huna rang taka che chhuak thei reng tura inbuatsaih thin turin SDRF, 1st IR Bn te chu a chah bawk a ni.

Vawiin intuaitharna hunah hian SDRF te hi a thu (theory) leh a taka tih chhinna (practical) hmangin training neihpui an ni a, chhiatrupna thlen thulha hmalak dan tur hrang hrangte an zirho a ni.

Attachment

title: Consumer Welfare Corpus Fund 2026: Proposals Invited to Promote Consumer Awareness and Rural Empowerment in Mizoram
content:
191/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial the 22ndJune, 2026: The Office of the District Civil Supplies Officer, Hnahthial, has invited proposals for financial assistance under the Mizoram Consumer Welfare (Corpus) Fund in accordance with the Mizoram Consumer Welfare Fund Guidelines, 2022. Eligible organizations and individuals are encouraged to submit projects aimed at enhancing consumer literacy, education, rural consumer empowerment, and other consumer welfare-related activities. Priority will be given to initiatives benefiting rural and disadvantaged consumers. Proposals must be submitted online tofcsamizoram@gmail.comon or before3rdJuly, 2026. Detailed guidelines and application formats are available atfcsca.mizoram.gov.in.

NOTICE

In line with the Mizoram Consumer Welfare Fund Guidelines, 2022, proposals are invited for financial assistance from the Consumer Welfare (Corpus) Fund to support projects aimed at promoting consumers' welfare. Eligibles entitles/individuals are encouraged to submit proposals focused on consumer literacy, education, rural consumer empowerment, and other related activities.

Key Guidelines:

1. Proposals should align with the objectives of the Mizoram Consumer Welfare Fund Guidelines, 2022.

2. Priority will be given to projects, especially those benefiting rural and disadvantaged consumers.

3. Eligible applicants will be as per the guidelines.

4. No financial grants under any circumstances shall be disbursed to any NGO without obtaining a unique ID no. generated from NGO Darpan Portal of Niti Aayog.

Submission Details:

Proposals must be submitted online to the department's email address:<59>fcsamizoram@gmail.com

Last date for submission of proposal:03.07.2026

For detailed guidelines and application format, please log on tofcsca.mizoram.gov.in

Attachment
